operating_state: Total revenue declined 11% to $41.83 billion for the six months driven by automotive sales decreasing from simultaneous factory changeovers to New Model Y and lower average selling prices from sales mix and customer incentives. Energy generation and storage revenue increased from higher Megapack and Powerwall deployments despite lower pricing. Services revenue grew from increased Supercharging, maintenance, insurance, and used vehicle sales.
cost_structure: Total gross margin compressed from 17.7% to 16.8% primarily due to lower automotive margins from reduced regulatory credits revenue and pricing pressure. Automotive gross margin declined from 18.5% to 16.8% driven by lower average selling prices and decreased regulatory credits, partially offset by lower material costs. Energy storage gross margin expanded from 24.6% to 29.6% due to lower unit costs from reduced raw material expenses.
material_events: Launched Robotaxi service in Austin in June 2025 capitalizing on AI investments and mobility infrastructure. Appointed John R. Hartung to the Board of Directors effective June 1, 2025, serving on the Audit Committee. Completed restructuring actions with employee termination expenses substantially finished by Q2 2025.
macro_exposures: Trade policy uncertainty poses risks to global supply chain costs and component availability, with current tariff regime having relatively larger impact on energy business versus automotive. OBBBA provisions including removal of electric vehicle tax credits may impact consumer demand once effective. Higher import tariffs and retaliatory measures could adversely affect consumer spending and increase battery cell expenses.
forward_outlook: Management expects capital expenditures to exceed $9.00 billion in 2025 for AI infrastructure, factory expansion, and product development, though trade policy changes may necessitate project timeline adjustments. Focus on profitable growth through leveraging existing capacity for new affordable products, advancing FSD capabilities, and expanding Robotaxi service. Next production growth phase driven by autonomy advances and next-generation platform vehicles.
uncertainty_profile: Government incentive reductions or eliminations for electric vehicles and energy storage products could negatively impact demand and financial results. Net metering benefits for solar customers face potential reductions across multiple jurisdictions. Foreign currency exchange rate fluctuations on significant intercompany balances create period-to-period volatility as the company typically does not hedge foreign currency risk.
